# openlex-demo-law

Demo law repository for [OpenLex](https://github.com/openlex-project/openlex) — demonstrates automated law synchronization from official EU and German sources.

## What's in this repo

### Configuration (manually maintained)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `sync.yaml` | Defines which laws to sync, from which sources, with translations and recital mappings |
| `.github/workflows/sync.yml` | Daily sync workflow using [openlex-lawsync](https://github.com/openlex-project/openlex-lawsync) |
| `README.md` | This file |

### Content (auto-generated by sync workflow)

| Directory | Content | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `dsgvo/` | GDPR articles (DE) + recitals | EUR-Lex (Cellar/Formex) |
| `dsgvo/en/` | GDPR articles (EN) + recitals | EUR-Lex |
| `dsgvo/fr/` | GDPR articles (FR) + recitals | EUR-Lex |
| `ai-act/` | AI Act articles (DE) + recitals | EUR-Lex (Cellar/Formex) |
| `ai-act/en/` | AI Act articles (EN) + recitals | EUR-Lex |
| `ai-act/fr/` | AI Act articles (FR) + recitals | EUR-Lex |
| `bgb/` | German Civil Code (DE only) | gesetze-im-internet.de |
| `stgb/` | German Criminal Code (DE only) | gesetze-im-internet.de |

Each law directory contains:
- `{nr}.md` — Article/section text as Markdown
- `rec-{nr}.md` — Recitals (EU laws only)
- `{locale}/` — Translated versions
- `toc.yaml` — Table of contents (auto-generated)

## How it works

The [openlex-lawsync](https://github.com/openlex-project/openlex-lawsync) GitHub Action runs daily at 4:00 UTC:

1. Reads `sync.yaml` for law definitions
2. Fetches content from GII (German federal law) and EUR-Lex Cellar (EU regulations)
3. Converts to Markdown
4. Commits changes and creates per-law version tags (`law/{slug}/{date}`)
5. Triggers a Vercel deploy hook to rebuild the OpenLex frontend

## Default locale

The default locale for this repository is **German (de)**. Translations are available for EU regulations in English and French.

## License

Content: Public domain (official legal texts).
